ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored in the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the match is played */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, live, finished) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee officiating the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team participates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the team */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_outcomes" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match on which the bet was placed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., over/under) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of money bet */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the bet (e.g., win, lose) */,
  "bet_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  "payout" REAL /* Amount paid out for a winning bet */,
  "refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bet was refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_outcomes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* User's biography or brief description */,
  "user_preferred_odds_format" TEXT /* User's preferred odds format (e.g., decimal, fractional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "league_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "league_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "country_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "country_gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the team */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the team */,
  "possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the team */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the team */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the team */,
  "substitutions" INTEGER /* Number of substitutions made by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player was on the field */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes made by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Percentage of accurate passes */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (if a goalkeeper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Player's biography or brief description */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sustained the injury */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury in days */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovering, out) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the referee */,
  "referee_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the referee */,
  "referee_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "referee_bio" TEXT /* Referee's biography or brief description */,
  "referee_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-referee assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee */,
  "assist_referee_1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first assistant referee */,
  "assist_referee_2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fourth official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_assist_referee_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("assist_referee_1_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_assist_referee_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("assist_referee_2_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_fourth_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("fourth_official_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odd */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., over/under) */,
  "odd_value" REAL /* Value of the odd */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bookmaker providing the odds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the odds were updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the odds (e.g., bookmaker, exchange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
